homepage.heroHeadline: Premium Epoxy Flooring for Minneapolis Homes
homepage.heroSubline: Transforming floors with durable, weather-resistant epoxy solutions. Built to withstand Minnesota's extreme winters and humid summers.
aboutText: Founded in 2012, Horizon Epoxy Flooring began with a mission to protect and beautify Twin Cities floors against harsh Midwestern weather.
We pioneered cold-climate epoxy formulations that resist cracking from freeze-thaw cycles, combining German chemical technology with local craftsmanship.
When we're not installing floors, you'll find our team volunteering at Habitat for Humanity builds or sponsoring youth hockey teams across Hennepin County.

valueProps.title: Arctic-Grade Formulations
valueProps.description: Specialized epoxy blends that stay flexible at -30°F to prevent winter cracking.

valueProps.title: Basement Specialists
valueProps.description: Moisture-blocking systems crucial for Minnesota's below-grade spaces.

homepage.ctaSubline: Our Minneapolis-based team will evaluate your space and recommend the ideal solution for your home's needs.

services.name: Garage Floor Epoxy
services.shortDescription: Heavy-duty protection against road salt, oil stains, and subzero temperatures.
services.description:
Minnesota garages face unique challenges - from winter road salt corrosion to summer humidity warping. Our 3-layer system starts with diamond grinding to expose pores in your concrete, followed by moisture-blocking primer specifically formulated for our climate. The final coat contains aluminum oxide for abrasion resistance against snow tires and hockey gear.

For Plymouth homes with 1970s-era garages, we address common issues like spalling concrete with polyurethane crack injections before application. In Eden Prairie's newer developments, we often incorporate decorative quartz blends that complement modern architecture.
process: Step 1: 48-hour moisture test with digital hygrometer
Step 2: Mechanical profiling with diamond grinders
Step 3: Application of thermal-break primer
Step 4: UV-cured topcoat with custom flake options
benefits: Eliminates concrete dust in finished basements
Reduces ice formation on floor surfaces

faq.question: How does your epoxy handle Minnesota's temperature swings?
faq.answer: Our proprietary FlexTec formula contains polymer microspheres that expand/contract with temperature changes, preventing the cracking commonly seen with standard epoxies after just one winter.

faq.question: Can you match my home's mid-century aesthetic?
faq.answer: Absolutely. We offer 60+ vintage-inspired color combinations and can recreate classic terrazzo patterns popular in 1950s Minneapolis ramblers.

faq.question: Will salt from my tires damage the finish?
faq.answer: Not with our SaltShield topcoat technology - laboratory tested to resist calcium chloride damage at concentrations 5x higher than typical road treatment levels.

services.name: Basement Floor Coating
services.shortDescription: Moisture-proof floors for finished basements and rec rooms.
services.description:
Over 80% of Minneapolis basements experience moisture intrusion annually. Our vapor-barrier system uses military-grade membranes tested at the U of M's Cold Climate Housing Lab. Unlike traditional epoxy that bubbles when moisture rises through slabs, our breathable barrier layer channels vapor to perimeter drains while maintaining a bone-dry surface.

For St. Paul's historic districts, we use low-VOC coatings that meet strict preservation guidelines. In Bloomington's 1960s ranch homes, we often integrate radiant heat cables beneath the coating for year-round comfort. The matte finish options reduce glare from basement LED lighting while hiding inevitable scuffs from storage bins and exercise equipment.
process: Step 1: PH testing to detect concrete alkalinity
Step 2: Electro-osmotic pulse treatment for active leaks
Step 3: Application of breathable epoxy membrane
Step 4: Texture application for barefoot comfort
benefits: Prevents mold growth in high-humidity months
Creates seamless surface for home gyms

faq.question: My basement floods occasionally - is epoxy still an option?
faq.answer: Yes - our AquaRelease system actually performs better in flood-prone areas. The semi-permeable coating allows water to evaporate without trapping it against the concrete.

faq.question: How does this compare to basement tiles?
faq.answer: Unlike tiles that shift during ground freeze cycles, our monolithic surface won't develop trip hazards or allow moisture between seams - crucial for Minnesota's active frost line.

faq.question: Can you work around existing mechanical systems?
faq.answer: Our technicians are trained to carefully coat around water heaters, furnaces, and support columns with precision tools - we never take shortcuts that would void appliance warranties.

services.name: Commercial Epoxy Flooring
services.shortDescription: Code-compliant solutions for retail, breweries, and medical facilities.
services.description:
From North Loop microbreweries dealing with constant wet conditions to Edina medical offices needing seamless sterile surfaces, we engineer industry-specific solutions. Our FDA-compliant epoxy meets Mayo Clinic cleanliness standards with antimicrobial additives, while the brewery-grade formulation resists constant pH fluctuations from malt acids and floor cleaners.

The high-traffic patterns at Mall of America retailers inspired our WearGuard technology - a ceramic-infused topcoat that lasts 3x longer than conventional epoxy under shopping cart traffic. For restaurants in Linden Hills, we incorporate slip-resistant aggregates that maintain traction even when kitchen grease meets melted snow tracked in by staff.
process: Step 1: Industry-specific risk assessment (slip factors, chemical exposure)
Step 2: Mechanical preparation with shot blasting
Step 3: Custom aggregate blending for performance needs
Step 4: Low-odor application during off-hours
benefits: Reduces worker compensation claims from slips
Meets ADA requirements for public spaces

faq.question: How quickly can my business reopen after application?
faq.answer: Our fast-cure system allows light foot traffic in 12 hours and full equipment loading in 36 hours - we've completed overnight installations for Target Corporation's distribution centers.

faq.question: Do you handle floor markings and wayfinding?
faq.answer: Yes - we digitally print durable lane markings, hazard areas, and logos using epoxy-based inks that withstand forklift traffic better than paint.

faq.question: Can you match our brand colors exactly?
faq.answer: Our color-matching system uses Pantone references - we recently matched the exact Cub Foods green for a new supermarket's receiving area.

services.name: Decorative Flake Flooring
services.shortDescription: Vibrant, durable finishes that brighten Minnesota's gray winters.
services.description:
Transform dreary basement floors or dated garage surfaces with our color flake systems. Using premium polymer flakes from Germany, we create custom blends that reflect your style - from subtle neutrals for Maple Grove's modern farmhouses to bold primary colors for Uptown's contemporary lofts.

The process begins with a tinted base coat that provides consistent color if flakes ever wear (unlike cheaper methods that reveal gray concrete underneath). We then broadcast thousands of metallic, matte, or iridescent flakes before sealing with a crystal-clear urethane. The result outlasts Minnesota seasons without yellowing from UV exposure - a common issue with inferior acrylic sealers used by competitors.
process: Step 1: Color consultation with physical flake samples
Step 2: Base coat application matching dominant flake color
Step 3: Precision flake broadcasting for even distribution
Step 4: UV-resistant aliphatic urethane topcoat
benefits: Easy to spot-clean from muddy paw prints

faq.question: How do you choose flake sizes?
faq.answer: We recommend smaller flakes (1/16") for intricate spaces like laundry rooms where detail matters, and larger flakes (1/4") for open garages where you want bold visual impact from a distance.

faq.question: Will the colors fade in my sunroom?
faq.answer: Our aliphatic urethane contains advanced UV blockers - we guarantee less than 5% color shift after 10 years, even in south-facing Four Seasons rooms.

faq.question: Can I change the color later?
faq.answer: Yes - unlike solid colors, our flake system allows easy updates. We simply apply a new base coat and different flakes without complete removal - we recently transformed a client's pink basement to navy blue in one day.

services.name: Concrete Repair & Leveling
services.shortDescription: Fixes for Minnesota's frost-heaved and spalled concrete.
services.description:
Before applying any decorative coating, we address the structural issues unique to our region. The freeze-thaw cycle destroys 60% of Twin Cities concrete within 15 years. Our polyurethane foam injection lifts sunken slabs without demolition, while polymer-modified repair mortars restore edges damaged by snowplows.

For Northeast Minneapolis' historic warehouse conversions, we use precision grinding to eliminate trip hazards while preserving original concrete character. In new Maple Grove developments, we apply shrinkage-compensating overlays that prevent the hairline cracks common in fast-track construction. Every repair includes thermal imaging to detect voids and moisture channels invisible to the naked eye - because coating over problems guarantees failure in our climate.
process: Step 1: Ground-penetrating radar scan for voids
Step 2: Polyurethane foam injection for lifting
Step 3: Steel-reinforced edge repairs
Step 4: Permeability testing before coatings
benefits: Prevents recurring damage from frost heave
Eliminates icy low spots in winter

faq.question: Can you fix my crumbling garage apron?
faq.answer: Yes - we replace deteriorated edges with steel-fiber reinforced concrete that withstands snowplow blades and salt exposure better than original material.

faq.question: How long until I can park on repaired slabs?
faq.answer: Our fast-set formulations allow vehicle traffic in 4 hours - critical for Minnesota winters when garages can't be out of service for days.

faq.question: Will repairs match my existing concrete?
faq.answer: We custom-tint repair materials to blend seamlessly - our color database includes exact matches for common Twin Cities concrete mixes from every decade since 1950.

reviews.name: James R.
reviews.text: After two winters, my old epoxy floor in Linden Hills was peeling from salt damage. Horizon installed their ArcticShield system right before the polar vortex hit - it's now survived -25°F mornings without a single crack. The blue metallic flakes make shoveling snow almost enjoyable!

reviews.name: Marta S.
reviews.text: Our 1920s St. Paul basement used to flood every spring. Horizon's team not only coated the floor but installed a hidden perimeter drainage system. Now our historic home has a functional rec room that stays dry even during April thaws. Worth every penny.

reviews.name: Devon W.
reviews.text: I run a yoga studio in Uptown and needed something durable yet beautiful. Horizon created a custom blend of lavender and silver flakes that cushions falls while being easy to sanitize. Clients constantly compliment how it sparkles under our pendant lights.

reviews.name: Lars N.
reviews.text: Our Eden Prairie driveway had a 3" sinkhole from frost heave. Horizon's foam injection lifted it perfectly level in 90 minutes - no heavy equipment tearing up our landscaping. Two winters later, it hasn't budged despite the extreme temperature swings.

reviews.name: Tami K.
reviews.text: As operations manager for a Plymouth industrial bakery, I worried about grease and constant washdowns destroying our floors. Horizon's chemical-resistant epoxy with slip-resistant texture has cut our mopping time in half while eliminating employee slips for 18 months running.

reviews.name: Carlos M.
reviews.text: The crew transformed our Maple Grove garage just before car season. They accommodated our collection of vintage Corvettes by working around lifts and cabinets. The black epoxy with red flakes makes oil drips easy to spot and clean - crucial for car shows.

service-areas.title: Minneapolis Epoxy Flooring Service Areas
service-areas.description: Proudly providing premium epoxy flooring services across Minneapolis, St. Paul, and surrounding communities.

serviceAreas.content: Horizon Epoxy Flooring proudly serves St. Paul, Minnesota, providing durable and stylish epoxy flooring solutions for homes and businesses. With its historic Victorian-era homes along Summit Avenue, St. Paul’s architecture demands flooring that complements its timeless charm while standing up to extreme cold winters. Our epoxy coatings are designed to resist sub-zero temperatures, preventing cracks and wear. Whether you’re restoring a historic property or upgrading a modern space, our team delivers seamless, high-gloss finishes that enhance both aesthetics and functionality.
serviceAreas.localContext: St. Paul is known for its historic Victorian homes and harsh winters, requiring flooring that balances beauty and resilience.

serviceAreas.content: Horizon Epoxy Flooring is a trusted provider of epoxy flooring solutions in Plymouth, MN, catering to its established suburban homes from the 1970s and 1980s. Plymouth’s homeowners appreciate durable, low-maintenance flooring that can withstand extreme cold winters. Our epoxy coatings are ideal for garages, basements, and living spaces, offering slip resistance and thermal stability. With customizable colors and finishes, we help Plymouth residents transform their floors into stylish, long-lasting surfaces.
serviceAreas.localContext: Plymouth features well-established suburban homes, where homeowners prioritize durability and ease of maintenance.

serviceAreas.content: Eden Prairie’s planned developments from the 1980s and 1990s benefit from Horizon Epoxy Flooring’s high-performance epoxy solutions. Our coatings are perfect for modern homes and commercial spaces, offering resistance to extreme cold and heavy foot traffic. Whether you’re upgrading a basement, garage, or retail space, our epoxy floors provide a sleek, easy-to-clean surface that enhances durability and style. Eden Prairie residents trust us for flawless installations tailored to their needs.
